evals.prompt: 帮我深度拆解 OiiOii：https://www.oiioii.ai/home，最终直接输出飞书文档型产品经理拆解长文。
evals.expected_output: Search/fetch current product information, generate the full Feishu document body with sections 10 and 11 ordered as 模型层拆解 then 不确定性处理, 3-8 high-value questions per section in blockquotes, product-manager insight sections in Feishu callout highlight blocks, and a near-square multi-color layered final architecture diagram with 市场层/商业层/用户层/应用层/模型层/基础层, colored layer backgrounds, expansion placeholders, balanced two-column/grid layout, and small modules arranged left-to-right within each layer; then create a new Feishu document in the user's personal cloud documents using lark-cli docs +create because no target Feishu document URL was provided.

evals.prompt: 直接写一篇 Cursor 的产品拆解，偏 AI 产品经理视角。我暂时没有截图，官网是 https://cursor.com。
evals.expected_output: Search/fetch current product information, draft the full teardown without asking more questions, then create a new Feishu document in the user's personal cloud documents; include 3-8 high-value questions per section in blockquotes, product-manager insight sections in Feishu callout highlight blocks, the official website, missing screenshots as information gaps, and the 13-section framework with section 10 as 模型层拆解, section 11 as 不确定性处理, and a near-square multi-color six-layer final architecture diagram with colored layer backgrounds, expansion placeholders, balanced grid layout, and left-to-right module placement inside every layer.

evals.prompt: 我想研究一个 AI Agent 产品，但是只给你产品名，没有资料。你先引导我。
evals.expected_output: Ask at most three key questions before writing, focused on the product name/materials and analysis goal/audience, but do not ask whether to create a Feishu document; default delivery is creating a new Feishu document once content is generated.

evals.prompt: 现在我要拆解猫箱产品，帮我进行框架搭建
evals.expected_output: Search/fetch current product information if possible, generate the framework document body with 3-8 high-value questions per section in blockquotes and product-manager insight sections in Feishu callout highlight blocks, keep section 10 as 模型层拆解 and section 11 as 不确定性处理, include a near-square multi-color 市场层/商业层/用户层/应用层/模型层/基础层 final architecture diagram with colored layer backgrounds, 预留扩展位 placeholders, balanced two-column/grid layout, and small modules arranged from left to right within each layer, then create a new Feishu document in the user's personal cloud documents without asking for a Feishu target link.

evals.prompt: 把 OiiOii 的产品深度拆解直接写到这个飞书文档里：https://example.feishu.cn/docx/example_token
evals.expected_output: Generate the full Feishu document body, then use lark-cli docs +update with the provided document URL and Markdown content instead of only replying with Markdown in chat.

evals.prompt: 我要拆解一个 AI Agent 产品，并重点反推它背后是不是 Workflow、单 Agent、多 Agent、有没有 RAG、有没有模型路由。请输出飞书文档。
evals.expected_output: Use the product-deep-dive workflow because the user asks for AI product deep teardown and Feishu document output. In technical, model, and uncertainty sections, do not present Workflow, Single Agent, Multi-Agent, RAG, model routing, external plugins, or prompt reconstruction as confirmed facts unless official evidence is available. Include a technical inference table with columns equivalent to 推测对象, 看到什么, 可能机制, 置信度, 为什么这么推, 如何验证, and 风险/Badcase. Use cautious wording such as 可能的提示词结构 for prompt-like reconstruction, and put insufficient evidence into 信息缺口清单.

evals.prompt: 帮我对一个 AI 视频生成产品做深度拆解并输出飞书文档，重点看测试评估体系。
evals.expected_output: Use section 2 测试评估体系 with the fixed main dimensions 端到端, 过程能力, and 综合评测. Do not replace those main dimensions with product-specific labels. Generate AI-video-specific second-level indicators such as 端到端结果层, 用户层, 模型数据层, 技术层, and cost/copyright/safety where appropriate. Include dimension explanations answering 评什么, 为什么重要, and 怎么评, plus a scenario-specific scoring table with scoring logic, weights/full score, current score or 待实测, and evidence or 待验证 notes.

evals.prompt: 现在我要拆解一个 AI 陪伴产品，帮我做框架搭建，并输出飞书文档。市场层要认真做。
evals.expected_output: Use the AI companion product-type emphasis when rewriting questions and evaluation indicators. In section 6 市场层拆解, include at least 3 main competitors and a comparison table with the exact columns 平台/公司, 主要角色, 分发渠道, 核心商业模式, 最新公开信息. Use verifiable public information when available and mark incomplete cells 待验证. Also include a competitive landscape diagram with product-relevant axes and place the analyzed product plus at least 3 competitors. Do not substitute the final six-layer architecture diagram for this section-level competitive landscape diagram.

evals.prompt: 直接写一个 AI 产品深度拆解框架，要求像资深 AI 产品经理写的，不要泛泛而谈，输出飞书文档。
evals.expected_output: Use the product-deep-dive workflow and create/update a Feishu document. The writing should meet a senior AIPM quality bar: key chapters must contain product judgment, user-job analysis, trade-offs, evidence boundaries, and reusable product lessons rather than generic phrases like AI 赋能, 提升效率, 降低门槛, 体验很好, or 功能丰富 without mechanism. Positioning, evaluation, market, business, technical, model, and product-manager insight sections should avoid L1/L2 template filling and include concrete reasoning tied to the product or, if evidence is missing, clear 待验证 items.

evals.prompt: 帮我拆解一个 AI Agent 产品，重点要有产品经理启发，最终输出飞书文档。
evals.expected_output: Generate the full Feishu-style teardown and ensure every numbered section ends with a Feishu callout/highlight block for 产品经理启发. The insights must be senior-AIPM quality: specific, derived from the analyzed product behavior, connected to user value or product trade-offs, and transferable as a design principle. Do not use generic slogans such as AI 产品要重视体验 or 要降低门槛. Technical and model insights should include evidence boundaries and confidence when they depend on inference.
